name: android-udev-rules
title: android-udev-rules
description:
udev rules for Android tools
This package provides udev rules enabling the Android SDK tools adb and
fastboot to work without root access to the host machine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-udev-rules because udev rules for Android tools.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-udev-rules as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-udev-rules with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-udev-rules --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
